steps.title: Identify what Adeyemi did
steps.content: The sentence says Adeyemi [blank] “a series of new images” for a 2020 exhibition. The word new is the key signal: the blank must describe producing something original, not evaluating, disputing, or recovering existing work.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — validated: means to confirm or corroborate; the text describes making images, not evaluating their legitimacy. ✗
  • Choice B — created: means produced or made; Adeyemi photographed models and layered images to produce new work, which is exactly what “created” describes. ✓
  • Choice C — challenged: means disputed or contested; nothing in the passage suggests Adeyemi was disputing the original posters or any prior claim. ✗
  • Choice D — restored: means to return something to a prior condition; Adeyemi made new images rather than reconditioning damaged ones. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
